//: OpenLane 2 (Python/Nix flow, aka LibreLane) config for riscv_pipeline.
//flow: Run:  cd gds_flow/openlane2 && openlane config.json   (or: openlane --flow Classic config.json). Outputs a routed GDSII + DRC/LVS + OpenSTA multi-corner signoff under runs/<tag>/.
//sv: RTL is SystemVerilog; OL2's Yosys reads it via the slang/synlig frontend. Symlink or copy rtl/cpu_riscv/*.sv into ./src, or point VERILOG_FILES at the rtl tree.
